name: avatar
description: A circular (or square) frame displaying a person or entity: image, auto-derived initials, or icon fallback. Diameter-based size scale (xs/sm/md/lg/xl/2xl, architecture-contract §5.b D5 -- NOT toolbar-aligned), circle|square shape, six intent colors with deterministic auto-hash from name, optional status dot (online/away/busy/offline, suppressed at xs), interactive wrappers (<a href> or <button>), ariaHidden decorative mode. Static presentational, zero JS, CSP-clean. Params: src, name, alt, initials, icon, size, shape, color, status, href, hrefLabel, clickable, ariaLabel, ariaHidden, cssClass, attrs, dataAttrs.
docs: Copies avatar.jte (+ avatar/group-count.jte and avatar/badge.jte) to your JTE root. Reached as @template.lievit.avatar(name=..., src=..., size="md"). Size is diameter-based (xs=24px, sm=32px, md=40px, lg=48px, xl=64px, 2xl=80px -- NOT toolbar-aligned per architecture-contract D5). shape="circle" (default) or "square". color sets the intent background for initials/icon (primary/secondary/accent/success/warning/destructive/default); null auto-hashes from name so the same person always gets the same hue. status="online|away|busy|offline" overlays a colored dot (suppressed at xs). Set href for a link wrapper or clickable=true for a button wrapper (provide hrefLabel/ariaLabel for an accessible name). Set ariaHidden=true for a decorative avatar where adjacent text identifies the person. Dynamic per-row data goes through the SAFE dataAttrs=Map.of("user-id", row.id()) channel; static wire directives go through attrs (TRUSTED, $unsafe, author-typed only). Adds two additive tokens: --lv-space-20 (5rem, 2xl diameter) and --lv-text-2xs (0.625rem, xs initials). The source is yours: edit freely.
